steps.title: Spot the pattern Text 1 predicts
steps.content: Text 1 explicitly states that regional US cookbooks are especially overlooked by scholars, regardless of their actual merit or complexity. This direct prediction is the key signal.

steps.title: Apply the pattern to Lewis's situation
steps.content:
Answer B correctly applies Text 1's prediction: scholars neglect regional cookbooks' literary value, making the overlooked masterpiece unsurprising.

The other three either ignore the documented pattern or misidentify the cause—
  • A focuses on popularity
  • C on the memoir blend
  • D on marketing strategy
.

That matches Choice B — As unsurprising, because scholars tend to overlook the literary value of food writing in general and of regional cookbooks in particular.
